calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-31-2018 Off Calendar

Amended Motion For Default Judgment To Be Entered After Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jul-10-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Rich Trivett.
Dept. 514. Judge: Leslie C. Nichols. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703.

Plaintiff in pro per Carl A. Wescott was present in pro per, placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defaulted defendant Rich Trivett.
Plaintiff's complaint for breach of contract was filed on April 17, 2017 and served on October 23, 2017.
Default was entered against defendant on December 17, 2017.
DOE defendants were dismissed on January 8, 2018.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Carl A. Wescott, and against the Defaulted Defendant Rich Trivett, as follows:

Damages - $27,121.88.
Prejudgment Interest - $2,712.19.

Total - $29,834.07.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
